name: Annual Strategic Planning Session
councilQuestion: Annual planning shows 3 strategic paths: aggressive expansion (high risk, high reward), consolidation (lower risk, steady growth), or transformation (pivot to new market). Historical advisors are split. Which path aligns with our 5-year vision?

name: Vendor Security Assessment
councilQuestion: New SaaS vendor offers 40% cost savings but lacks SOC 2 certification. They commit to certification in 6 months. Should we proceed with additional contractual protections, wait for certification, or stay with current more expensive vendor?
expectedOutcome: Approved vendor decision with risk mitigation

name: Emergency Fund Allocation

steps.action: Council rapid approval for fund release

councilQuestion: Unexpected equipment failure requires $200K immediate replacement. Emergency fund has $150K. Options: partial fix now ($100K), full replacement with credit ($200K + interest), or defer non-critical projects to fund. Which approach minimizes business impact?

name: Cross-Border Data Transfer Compliance

steps.action: Assess GDPR and local law compliance
Council approval for data transfer framework

councilQuestion: New EU customer requires data residency in Germany but our AI processing is US-based. Options: deploy EU processing ($500K), use approved transfer mechanisms (legal risk), or decline the deal ($2M ARR). How do we balance compliance and business opportunity?

name: Product Pricing Strategy Review

steps.action: Model investor reaction to pricing changes

councilQuestion: Competitive pressure suggests 15% price reduction to maintain market share. Analysis shows this reduces margin by 8% but could increase volume 25%. Alternatively, we could add features to justify current pricing. Which strategy maximizes long-term value?

name: Succession Planning Review
councilQuestion: Succession review shows 3 critical roles with no ready-now successors. Internal candidates need 18-24 months development. External hiring is faster but risks culture fit. Should we accelerate internal development, hire externally, or accept the risk?

name: Technology Debt Remediation

steps.action: Council approval for tech debt budget

councilQuestion: Technical debt assessment shows $2M in accumulated debt affecting velocity by 30%. Full remediation takes 6 months and pauses new features. Incremental approach takes 18 months but maintains feature velocity. Which approach balances innovation and stability?

name: Partner Ecosystem Expansion
councilQuestion: Partner ecosystem analysis shows opportunity for 3 strategic partnerships: technology integration (expand capabilities), channel partnership (expand reach), or co-development (share R&D costs). Resources allow pursuing 2. Which partnerships maximize ecosystem value?

name: Customer Expansion Revenue Planning
councilQuestion: Customer health analysis identifies $3M in expansion revenue opportunity across 25 accounts. Sales capacity can pursue 15 accounts. Should we prioritize by deal size (fewer, larger deals), health score (higher success rate), or strategic value (reference customers)?

name: Environmental Sustainability Initiative
councilQuestion: Sustainability audit shows we can achieve carbon neutrality in 3 years with $1M investment or 5 years with $400K. Investors increasingly value ESG. Customers are asking about sustainability. Which timeline and investment level balances stakeholder expectations?

name: Competitive Intelligence Briefing
councilQuestion: Competitive intelligence shows our main rival is preparing a major product launch that could undercut our positioning. We have 60 days before their launch. Should we accelerate our roadmap, adjust pricing preemptively, or strengthen our differentiation messaging?

name: Remote Work Policy Update

steps.action: Assess skill development in remote context

councilQuestion: Remote work data shows productivity maintained but collaboration and mentorship declining. Employee dissent shows strong preference for flexibility. Options: mandatory 3 days in-office, team-based flexibility, or fully remote with quarterly gatherings. Which policy balances needs?

name: API Deprecation Planning
councilQuestion: Legacy API v1 must be deprecated but 15% of customers still use it. 6-month migration window is standard but some customers request 12 months. Maintaining both versions costs $100K/quarter. What deprecation timeline balances customer needs and costs?

name: Insurance Coverage Review
councilQuestion: Annual insurance review shows cyber coverage at $5M but risk assessment suggests $10M needed. Premium increase is $50K/year. Alternatively, we can self-insure the gap with $500K reserve. Which approach optimizes risk transfer vs cost?

name: Customer Advisory Board Formation

steps.action: Analyze customer voice for key themes

councilQuestion: Customer advisory board proposal includes 12 customers across segments. Some want strategic influence, others want early access to features. Should we create one unified board, segment-specific boards, or a tiered structure with different levels of engagement?

name: Data Center Migration Planning
councilQuestion: Data center lease expires in 8 months. Migration options: cloud-native ($2M, 6 months, operational savings), new colo ($1.5M, 4 months, similar costs), or hybrid ($1.8M, 5 months, flexibility). Which approach aligns with our technology strategy?

name: Brand Refresh Initiative
councilQuestion: Brand perception study shows we're seen as 'reliable but dated'. Options: evolutionary refresh (low risk, incremental improvement), revolutionary rebrand (high impact, high risk), or targeted refresh for specific segments. Which approach modernizes without alienating?

name: Compliance Training Effectiveness
councilQuestion: Compliance training analysis shows 95% completion but only 40% knowledge retention after 6 months. Incident rates correlate with retention. Options: more frequent refreshers, gamified learning, or scenario-based training. Which approach improves actual compliance behavior?

name: Revenue Recognition Policy Update
councilQuestion: New product bundle requires revenue recognition policy update. Conservative approach delays recognition by 1 quarter (lower near-term revenue). Aggressive approach recognizes earlier (audit risk). Which approach balances investor expectations and compliance?

name: Incident Communication Protocol
councilQuestion: Post-incident review shows our communication was too slow (2 hours to first customer notification). Options: automated status page updates (fast but impersonal), tiered notification by severity (balanced), or proactive over-communication (builds trust but may alarm). Which protocol?

name: AI Model Governance Review

steps.action: Audit AI model performance and bias
Council approval for AI governance updates

councilQuestion: AI model audit reveals 3% bias in loan approval recommendations affecting certain demographics. Options: retrain model with balanced data (2 months), add human review layer (immediate but costly), or pause AI recommendations pending fix. Which approach balances fairness and business continuity?

name: Supply Chain Resilience Assessment

steps.action: Council approval for supply chain investments

councilQuestion: Supply chain analysis shows single-source dependency for 3 critical components. Dual-sourcing costs 15% more but reduces disruption risk by 60%. Alternative: increase safety stock by 90 days ($2M inventory). Which approach optimizes resilience vs cost?

name: Employee Wellness Program Launch
councilQuestion: Employee survey shows 40% report burnout symptoms. Wellness program options: mental health benefits expansion ($200K/year), flexible work arrangements (productivity impact unknown), or comprehensive wellness platform ($150K + $50K/year). Which investment best addresses burnout?

name: International Expansion Due Diligence
councilQuestion: APAC expansion opportunity shows $50M TAM but requires local entity, data residency, and translated product. Investment: $3M over 18 months. ROI positive in year 3. Alternatively, partner with local distributor (lower investment, lower margin). Which approach maximizes long-term value?

name: Customer Data Platform Selection
councilQuestion: CDP vendor evaluation shows 3 finalists: Enterprise vendor ($500K/year, full features, complex), mid-market ($200K/year, 80% features, faster implementation), or build custom ($400K one-time, full control, maintenance burden). Which option balances capability, cost, and time-to-value?

name: Regulatory Change Impact Assessment
councilQuestion: New data privacy regulation takes effect in 12 months. Full compliance requires $800K investment and process changes. Minimum compliance is $300K but limits future product features. Which compliance level balances regulatory risk and business flexibility?

name: Sales Territory Realignment
councilQuestion: Territory analysis shows 30% imbalance in opportunity distribution. Realignment improves fairness but disrupts 40% of customer relationships. Options: full realignment (maximize efficiency), gradual transition (18 months), or hybrid with account protection. Which approach balances efficiency and relationships?

name: Disaster Recovery Test Execution
councilQuestion: DR test revealed RTO of 6 hours vs target of 4 hours. Root cause: database replication lag. Options: upgrade to synchronous replication ($100K/year, meets RTO), accept 6-hour RTO (document risk), or implement hybrid approach (5-hour RTO, $50K). Which option balances cost and risk?

name: Product Localization Strategy
councilQuestion: Localization analysis shows 5 high-potential markets. Full localization per market costs $150K. Resources allow 2 markets this year. Options: largest markets (Germany, Japan), fastest growing (Brazil, India), or strategic (France for EU credibility). Which markets maximize global expansion?

name: Executive Compensation Review
councilQuestion: Executive compensation review shows we're at 60th percentile vs peers. Retention risk for 2 key executives. Options: increase base to 75th percentile ($400K impact), enhance equity grants (dilution concern), or add retention bonuses (one-time cost). Which approach balances retention and shareholder interests?

name: Customer Churn Prediction Model

steps.action: Train and validate churn prediction model

councilQuestion: Churn prediction model identifies 50 at-risk accounts worth $5M ARR. Intervention options: proactive outreach (low cost, moderate success), discount offers (high success, margin impact), or executive engagement (high success, limited scale). Which intervention strategy maximizes retention ROI?

name: Open Source Contribution Policy
councilQuestion: Engineering wants to open-source a utility library. Benefits: community goodwill, talent attraction. Risks: competitive insight, maintenance burden. Options: full open-source (MIT license), limited open-source (Apache with CLA), or keep proprietary. Which approach balances community engagement and IP protection?

name: Investor Relations Strategy Update
councilQuestion: Investor feedback shows concerns about growth trajectory. Options: increase guidance transparency (builds trust, limits flexibility), accelerate strategic announcements (short-term boost, execution pressure), or maintain current approach (risk of valuation pressure). Which IR strategy balances transparency and flexibility?

name: Quality Assurance Process Improvement

steps.action: Analyze current QA metrics and bottlenecks

councilQuestion: QA analysis shows 40% of cycle time in manual testing. Automation investment of $200K could reduce to 15%. Alternatively, hire 2 additional QA engineers ($180K/year ongoing). Which approach optimizes quality velocity long-term?

name: Whistleblower Report Investigation
councilQuestion: Anonymous whistleblower report alleges financial irregularities in a business unit. Initial review suggests potential substance. Options: internal investigation (faster, confidentiality), external counsel (independence, cost), or regulatory self-report (proactive, uncertain outcome). Which approach balances thoroughness and risk?

name: Content Marketing Strategy Refresh
councilQuestion: Content analysis shows blog engagement declining 20% YoY while video engagement up 50%. Options: pivot to video-first (production cost increase), hybrid approach (maintain blog, add video), or double down on SEO-optimized written content. Which content strategy maximizes audience engagement?

name: Third-Party Risk Assessment

steps.action: Assess security posture of critical vendors
Deploy canary monitoring for data access
Council approval for vendor risk actions

councilQuestion: Third-party risk assessment identifies 5 vendors with elevated risk scores. Options: terminate relationships (business disruption), require security improvements (timeline uncertainty), or implement enhanced monitoring (ongoing cost). Which approach balances risk reduction and business continuity?

name: Product Accessibility Compliance

steps.action: Gather feedback from users with disabilities

councilQuestion: Accessibility audit shows WCAG 2.1 AA compliance at 70%. Full compliance requires $300K investment over 6 months. Government contracts require 100% compliance. Options: full remediation (unlock government market), prioritized fixes (90% compliance, lower cost), or defer (risk losing RFP eligibility). Which approach?

name: Knowledge Management System Implementation
councilQuestion: Knowledge management assessment shows 30% of institutional knowledge at risk due to upcoming retirements. KM system investment: $250K implementation, $50K/year. ROI through reduced onboarding time and knowledge retention. Should we proceed with full implementation, phased approach, or enhanced documentation only?

name: Customer Segmentation Refinement
councilQuestion: Segmentation analysis suggests current 4-segment model misses emerging customer types. Options: expand to 6 segments (more targeted, more complex), behavioral micro-segmentation (AI-driven, dynamic), or refine existing segments (simpler, less precise). Which approach optimizes marketing effectiveness?

name: Contract Lifecycle Management Optimization
councilQuestion: Contract lifecycle analysis shows average 45-day cycle time with 60% in legal review. CLM platform investment: $150K. Expected reduction to 20 days. Alternatively, add legal headcount ($120K/year) for 30-day cycle. Which approach optimizes contract velocity and cost?

name: Cybersecurity Insurance Renewal
councilQuestion: Cyber insurance renewal shows 40% premium increase due to market conditions. Options: accept increase (maintain coverage), increase deductible (lower premium, more risk), or reduce coverage limits (lower premium, gap in protection). Which approach balances cost and risk transfer?

name: Employee Referral Program Enhancement

steps.action: Gather employee feedback on referral experience

councilQuestion: Referral program generates 20% of hires but participation is declining. Enhancement options: increase referral bonus (cost increase), gamification with leaderboards (engagement focus), or tiered rewards based on role difficulty (targeted incentives). Which innovation maximizes referral quality and quantity?

name: API Monetization Strategy

steps.action: Analyze market pricing for similar APIs

councilQuestion: API monetization analysis shows $2M annual revenue potential. Pricing models: usage-based (aligns with value, unpredictable revenue), tiered subscriptions (predictable, may limit adoption), or freemium with premium tiers (adoption focus, conversion uncertainty). Which model maximizes long-term API revenue?

name: Board Meeting Preparation

steps.action: Generate decision audit trail for board

councilQuestion: Board meeting agenda includes sensitive strategic pivot discussion. Options: full transparency with detailed analysis (builds trust, competitive risk if leaked), high-level summary with verbal detail (balanced), or defer discussion pending further analysis (delays decision). Which approach balances board governance and confidentiality?

name: Customer Data Enrichment Initiative
councilQuestion: Customer data enrichment could improve targeting by 30% but requires third-party data purchase ($100K/year) and raises privacy considerations. Options: full enrichment (maximum value, privacy risk), limited enrichment (firmographic only), or first-party data focus (slower, privacy-safe). Which approach balances value and privacy?

name: Sustainability Reporting Framework
councilQuestion: Sustainability reporting requirements are expanding. Options: adopt comprehensive GRI framework (gold standard, resource intensive), limited SASB reporting (industry-specific, less comprehensive), or voluntary disclosure (flexible, less credibility). Which framework balances stakeholder expectations and reporting burden?

name: Shadow IT Discovery and Governance

steps.action: Assess security risks of shadow IT

councilQuestion: Shadow IT discovery found 47 unauthorized SaaS tools with $200K annual spend. Options: immediate shutdown (security focus, productivity disruption), gradual migration to approved alternatives (balanced), or formalize and govern (pragmatic, ongoing risk). Which approach balances security and productivity?

name: Customer Journey Mapping Initiative
councilQuestion: Customer journey mapping reveals 5 major friction points. Addressing all requires $500K investment. Options: fix top 2 friction points (80% of complaints, $200K), comprehensive journey redesign ($500K, transformational), or incremental improvements (lower investment, slower impact). Which approach maximizes customer experience ROI?

name: Merger Integration Planning
councilQuestion: Post-merger integration planning shows 3 approaches: rapid integration (6 months, high synergy capture, high risk), phased integration (18 months, lower risk, delayed synergies), or best-of-breed selection (12 months, optimizes capabilities, complex). Which approach maximizes merger value while managing integration risk?

name: Fraud Detection Model Enhancement
councilQuestion: Fraud detection model shows 85% accuracy but 5% false positive rate affecting customer experience. Enhanced model achieves 92% accuracy with 2% false positives but requires 3-month retraining. Should we deploy immediately with current model improvements or wait for full retraining?

name: Vendor Contract Renegotiation

steps.action: Analyze current contract terms and spend
Review legal obligations and exit clauses

councilQuestion: Major vendor contract renewal shows 20% price increase. Options: accept increase (maintain relationship), competitive bid (risk transition costs), or negotiate multi-year commitment for discount (lock-in risk). Which approach optimizes cost and flexibility?

name: Employee Performance Review Calibration
councilQuestion: Performance review calibration shows rating inflation in some departments. Options: forced distribution (controversial, ensures differentiation), manager training (slower, sustainable), or peer calibration sessions (time-intensive, collaborative). Which approach ensures fair and consistent evaluations?

name: Cloud Cost Optimization Initiative
councilQuestion: Cloud cost analysis shows 30% potential savings through rightsizing and reserved instances. Options: aggressive optimization (maximum savings, performance risk), conservative approach (15% savings, minimal risk), or phased optimization with monitoring. Which approach balances savings and reliability?

name: Customer Feedback Loop Implementation
councilQuestion: Customer feedback analysis shows valuable insights scattered across channels. Options: unified feedback platform ($150K), AI-powered sentiment analysis integration ($100K), or enhanced manual review process ($50K/year). Which approach maximizes actionable insights from customer voice?

name: Regulatory Audit Preparation
councilQuestion: Regulatory audit in 60 days. Gap analysis shows 3 control deficiencies. Full remediation takes 45 days (tight timeline), compensating controls take 2 weeks (may not satisfy auditors), or request audit delay (relationship risk). Which approach ensures successful audit outcome?

name: Partner Revenue Share Model
councilQuestion: Partner program review shows current 20% revenue share underperforms market. Options: increase to 30% (attract more partners, margin impact), tiered model based on volume (complexity, incentivizes growth), or value-based pricing (aligns incentives, harder to administer). Which model maximizes partner ecosystem value?

name: Data Retention Policy Update
councilQuestion: Data retention review shows inconsistent policies across systems. Options: unified 7-year retention (simple, storage costs), tiered retention by data type (complex, optimized), or minimum legal retention only (cost-effective, litigation risk). Which policy balances compliance, cost, and business needs?

name: Sales Enablement Platform Selection
councilQuestion: Sales enablement platform evaluation shows 3 options: enterprise platform ($200K/year, full features), mid-market ($80K/year, core features), or build on existing CRM ($50K customization). Which option maximizes sales productivity improvement?

name: Crisis Communication Drill
councilQuestion: Crisis drill revealed communication delays and unclear escalation paths. Options: comprehensive playbook update (thorough, time-intensive), targeted fixes for critical gaps (faster, incomplete), or external crisis management consultant (expertise, cost). Which approach best improves crisis readiness?

name: Intellectual Property Audit

steps.action: Assess strategic value of IP portfolio

councilQuestion: IP audit reveals 3 unprotected innovations and 5 expiring patents. Options: file new patents ($150K), extend existing patents where possible ($50K), or focus on trade secret protection (lower cost, less protection). Which approach maximizes IP portfolio value?

name: Customer Health Score Recalibration

steps.action: Council approval for new health scoring

councilQuestion: Health score analysis shows current model misses 20% of churning customers. New model improves prediction by 35% but requires different data inputs. Options: full model replacement (disruption), hybrid approach (complexity), or incremental tuning (limited improvement). Which approach optimizes prediction accuracy?

name: Manufacturing Quality Control Enhancement
councilQuestion: Quality analysis shows 2% defect rate costing $500K annually. AI-powered inspection could reduce to 0.5% with $200K investment. Manual inspection enhancement costs $100K for 1% defect rate. Which approach optimizes quality vs investment?

name: Employee Engagement Survey Analysis
councilQuestion: Engagement survey shows 15% decline in manager effectiveness scores. Root causes: unclear expectations, limited development, and workload. Options: manager training program ($100K), restructure reporting lines (disruptive), or targeted coaching for low-scoring managers. Which approach improves engagement most effectively?

name: Competitive Pricing Response

steps.action: Model financial impact of response options

councilQuestion: Competitor announced 25% price cut effective next week. Options: match pricing (margin impact), selective matching for at-risk deals (complex), or emphasize value differentiation (risk losing price-sensitive customers). Which response protects market share while preserving margins?

name: Data Privacy Impact Assessment

steps.action: Evaluate security controls for personal data

councilQuestion: DPIA for new feature reveals high-risk processing of biometric data. Options: implement enhanced consent and controls ($150K), redesign feature to avoid biometric processing (delays launch), or limit to jurisdictions without biometric restrictions. Which approach balances privacy compliance and business objectives?

name: Channel Partner Enablement Program
councilQuestion: Partner analysis shows top 10 partners generate 80% of channel revenue but lack technical depth. Options: intensive certification program ($200K), dedicated partner success managers ($300K/year), or co-selling with direct team (capacity constraints). Which approach maximizes partner-driven revenue?

name: IT Service Management Optimization
councilQuestion: ITSM analysis shows 40% of tickets are password resets and access requests. Options: implement self-service portal ($80K), AI-powered chatbot ($120K), or additional helpdesk staff ($150K/year). Which approach optimizes IT service efficiency and user satisfaction?

name: Corporate Social Responsibility Initiative
councilQuestion: CSR review shows opportunity to enhance community impact. Options: employee volunteer program (engagement focus), charitable giving matching (simple, broad impact), or strategic partnership with nonprofit (deeper impact, more effort). Which approach maximizes social impact and employee engagement?

name: Product End-of-Life Planning

steps.action: Generate EOL timeline and migration plan

councilQuestion: Legacy product generates $500K ARR but costs $300K to maintain. 50 customers affected. Options: immediate EOL with migration incentives (fast, churn risk), 18-month sunset with support (balanced), or spin off to partner (revenue share, less control). Which approach minimizes customer impact while optimizing resources?

name: Zero Trust Security Implementation

steps.action: Implement hardware attestation for critical systems

councilQuestion: Zero trust assessment shows 18-month full implementation at $500K. Options: phased approach starting with critical systems (lower risk, longer timeline), accelerated implementation (higher cost, faster protection), or hybrid with compensating controls. Which approach balances security improvement and operational continuity?

name: Revenue Forecasting Model Update
councilQuestion: Revenue forecast model shows 15% average variance from actuals. New AI model reduces variance to 5% but requires more data inputs. Options: full model replacement (accuracy improvement, change management), hybrid approach (gradual transition), or enhanced manual review (lower improvement). Which approach optimizes forecast reliability?

name: Talent Acquisition Strategy Refresh
councilQuestion: Talent acquisition shows 60-day average time-to-fill and declining offer acceptance. Options: enhanced employer branding ($150K), AI-powered sourcing tools ($100K), or increased recruiter capacity ($200K/year). Which investment most effectively improves talent acquisition outcomes?

name: Customer Contract Renewal Automation
councilQuestion: Renewal process takes 30 days average with 85% on-time renewal rate. Automation could reduce to 10 days and improve rate to 92%. Investment: $120K. Options: full automation, phased rollout by segment, or process optimization without automation. Which approach maximizes renewal efficiency?

name: Regulatory Sandbox Participation
councilQuestion: Regulatory sandbox opportunity allows testing new financial product with relaxed requirements. Benefits: faster innovation, regulatory relationship. Risks: resource commitment, uncertain outcome. Options: full participation, limited pilot, or wait for regulatory clarity. Which approach balances innovation and regulatory risk?

name: Multi-Cloud Strategy Assessment
councilQuestion: Multi-cloud assessment shows potential for 20% cost reduction and improved resilience but adds complexity. Options: full multi-cloud (maximum flexibility, highest complexity), hybrid approach (balance), or optimize single cloud (simpler, vendor lock-in). Which strategy aligns with our technology and business objectives?

name: Customer Education Program Launch
councilQuestion: Customer education analysis shows correlation between training completion and product adoption. Options: self-paced online academy ($100K), instructor-led virtual training ($150K), or certification program with incentives ($200K). Which approach maximizes customer product adoption and satisfaction?

name: Supply Chain Sustainability Audit

steps.action: Review supplier contracts for ESG clauses

councilQuestion: Supply chain sustainability audit reveals 30% of suppliers don't meet ESG standards. Options: require compliance within 12 months (risk supplier loss), gradual improvement with support (longer timeline), or replace non-compliant suppliers (disruption risk). Which approach balances sustainability goals and supply chain stability?

name: Product Analytics Enhancement
councilQuestion: Product analytics gaps limit feature prioritization decisions. Options: comprehensive analytics platform ($200K), targeted instrumentation for key features ($80K), or enhanced user research program ($100K). Which approach provides best product insights for decision-making?

name: Executive Dashboard Redesign
councilQuestion: Executive dashboard review shows fragmented reporting across 5 systems. Options: unified executive dashboard ($150K), integrated BI platform ($250K), or standardized report templates ($50K). Which approach best enables executive decision-making?

name: Incident Response Plan Update
councilQuestion: Incident response plan review shows gaps in ransomware and supply chain attack scenarios. Options: comprehensive plan update with tabletop exercises ($100K), targeted updates for new threat vectors ($40K), or external IR retainer ($80K/year). Which approach best prepares for emerging threats?

name: Customer Advocacy Program
councilQuestion: Customer advocacy analysis shows 25 highly satisfied customers willing to participate. Options: formal reference program with incentives ($75K), case study and testimonial program ($50K), or customer community platform ($150K). Which approach maximizes advocacy impact for sales and marketing?

name: Technical Debt Prioritization
councilQuestion: Technical debt inventory shows $3M in accumulated debt. Options: dedicate 20% of sprint capacity to debt (ongoing, balanced), focused debt sprint quarterly (concentrated, disruptive), or address only critical debt (minimal investment, growing problem). Which approach balances innovation velocity and system health?

name: Diversity and Inclusion Initiative

steps.action: Assess current D&I metrics and gaps

councilQuestion: D&I assessment shows underrepresentation in leadership and inclusion concerns in employee feedback. Options: comprehensive D&I program with external consultant ($200K), internal ERG-led initiatives ($50K), or targeted leadership development ($100K). Which approach most effectively improves diversity and inclusion outcomes?

name: API Rate Limiting Strategy

steps.action: Model revenue impact of rate limiting tiers

councilQuestion: API usage analysis shows 5% of customers consume 60% of API capacity. Options: implement tiered rate limits (fair, may upset heavy users), usage-based pricing (aligns cost, complexity), or infrastructure scaling (higher cost, no limits). Which approach balances fairness, revenue, and customer experience?

name: Quarterly Business Review Process
councilQuestion: QBR analysis shows inconsistent execution and missed expansion opportunities. Options: standardized QBR playbook with templates ($30K), QBR automation platform ($100K), or dedicated QBR specialists ($150K/year). Which approach maximizes QBR value for retention and expansion?

name: Compliance Monitoring Automation
councilQuestion: Compliance monitoring currently requires 2 FTE for manual reviews. Automation could reduce to 0.5 FTE with $180K investment. Options: full automation, phased automation starting with high-risk areas, or enhanced manual process with better tools. Which approach optimizes compliance efficiency?

name: Customer Segmentation for Pricing

steps.action: Analyze customer value and willingness to pay
Segment customers by usage and health

councilQuestion: Pricing analysis shows opportunity for segment-based pricing with 15% revenue uplift potential. Options: value-based pricing by segment (maximum uplift, complexity), good-better-best packaging (simpler, moderate uplift), or usage-based pricing (aligns with value, unpredictable). Which approach optimizes revenue while maintaining customer satisfaction?

name: Air-Gap Deployment Planning
councilQuestion: Government customer requires air-gapped deployment. Options: full air-gap capability with QR bridge ($200K development), limited offline mode ($80K), or decline requirement (lose $500K deal). Which approach balances development investment and market opportunity?

name: Employee Offboarding Process Improvement
councilQuestion: Offboarding audit shows 15% of departing employees retain system access for 48+ hours. Options: automated access revocation system ($100K), enhanced manual checklist with accountability ($20K), or same-day IT escort process (resource intensive). Which approach best protects company assets while maintaining positive offboarding experience?

name: Time-Locked Decision Release
councilQuestion: Strategic acquisition announcement requires time-locked release to prevent insider trading. Options: 72-hour cryptographic time-lock (maximum security), trusted escrow with legal hold (traditional), or simultaneous multi-party release (coordination complexity). Which approach ensures compliant and secure announcement timing?

name: Federated Learning Initiative
councilQuestion: Federated learning could enable multi-site model training without centralizing sensitive data. Options: full federated implementation ($300K), hybrid with central aggregation ($150K), or traditional centralized approach (privacy concerns). Which approach balances innovation, privacy, and cost?

name: Customer Win-Back Campaign
councilQuestion: Win-back analysis identifies 100 churned customers worth $2M potential ARR. Options: aggressive discount campaign (high conversion, margin impact), value-focused outreach (lower conversion, better margins), or product improvement showcase (requires new features). Which approach maximizes win-back ROI?

name: Local RLHF Model Training
councilQuestion: Local RLHF training shows 25% improvement in model alignment with company values. Options: deploy immediately (capture value, limited testing), extended validation period (more confidence, delayed value), or A/B test deployment (balanced, complexity). Which approach optimizes model improvement while managing risk?

name: Vendor Consolidation Initiative
councilQuestion: Vendor analysis shows 15 overlapping tools with $500K potential savings through consolidation. Options: aggressive consolidation (maximum savings, transition risk), phased approach by category (balanced), or best-of-breed retention (minimal savings, optimal tools). Which approach optimizes cost and capability?

name: Canary Data Exfiltration Detection

steps.action: Deploy canary records across data stores

councilQuestion: Canary tripwire program could detect data exfiltration attempts. Options: comprehensive deployment across all data stores ($100K), targeted deployment for sensitive data ($40K), or honeypot-only approach ($20K). Which approach provides best detection coverage for investment?

name: Product Roadmap Prioritization
councilQuestion: Roadmap prioritization shows 3 competing themes: enterprise features (high revenue, long development), platform stability (customer retention, no new revenue), or innovation features (market differentiation, uncertain demand). Which theme should dominate next quarter's roadmap?

name: Deterministic Decision Replay
councilQuestion: Regulatory requirement for bit-perfect decision reproducibility. Options: full deterministic replay capability ($150K), simplified audit trail with manual verification ($50K), or third-party audit service ($80K/year). Which approach satisfies regulatory requirements most cost-effectively?

name: Sales Compensation Plan Redesign

steps.action: Model financial impact of plan changes

councilQuestion: Sales compensation analysis shows misalignment with strategic priorities. Options: shift to multi-year value focus (long-term alignment, short-term risk), increase expansion incentives (growth focus), or simplify plan structure (easier administration, less precision). Which approach best aligns compensation with strategy?

name: Shadow Council Scenario Testing

steps.action: Council review of shadow council findings

councilQuestion: Shadow council tested radical market pivot scenario. Results show potential 3x growth but 40% execution risk. Options: pursue pivot with risk mitigation, test limited pilot, or maintain current strategy with incremental improvements. How should we incorporate shadow council insights into strategic planning?

name: Customer Data Migration
councilQuestion: Customer data migration to new platform affects 500 customers. Options: big-bang migration (faster, higher risk), phased migration by segment (balanced), or customer-driven opt-in (slowest, lowest risk). Which approach minimizes customer disruption while achieving migration goals?

name: Regulatory Lobbying Strategy
councilQuestion: Proposed regulation could significantly impact our business model. Options: active lobbying through industry association ($200K), direct engagement with regulators (relationship building), or compliance-focused adaptation (accept regulation). Which approach best protects business interests while maintaining regulatory relationships?

name: Employee Benefits Optimization
councilQuestion: Benefits analysis shows 30% of benefits budget goes to underutilized programs. Options: reallocate to high-demand benefits (employee satisfaction), reduce overall benefits cost (margin improvement), or add flexible benefits allowance (choice, complexity). Which approach optimizes benefits value for employees and company?

name: Competitive Feature Parity Analysis
councilQuestion: Competitive analysis shows 5 feature gaps affecting win rates. Closing all gaps requires 6 months development. Options: prioritize top 2 gaps (faster, partial improvement), parallel development of all gaps (resource intensive), or differentiate on strengths instead (strategic pivot). Which approach best improves competitive position?

name: Business Continuity Plan Update
councilQuestion: BCP review reveals gaps in pandemic and cyber attack scenarios. Options: comprehensive BCP overhaul with testing ($150K), targeted updates for new scenarios ($50K), or outsourced BCP management ($100K/year). Which approach ensures business resilience most effectively?

name: Customer Success Playbook Development

steps.action: Gather CSM feedback on current processes

councilQuestion: Customer success analysis shows inconsistent outcomes across CSMs. Options: comprehensive playbook with certification ($100K), peer mentoring program ($30K), or technology-enabled guidance ($150K). Which approach most effectively standardizes customer success outcomes?

name: International Tax Optimization

steps.action: Council approval for tax structure changes

councilQuestion: International tax review shows $500K annual savings opportunity through restructuring. Options: full restructuring (maximum savings, complexity), targeted optimization (moderate savings, lower risk), or maintain current structure (no savings, simplicity). Council validates and authorizes autonomous execution
